features: Quality Material: Crafted with premium PP bristles, FOOGWEE cleaning brush offers durability and efficiency and ensures the comprehensive cleaning of the house

Deep Crevice Cleaning: As perfect cleaning brushes for difficult places to reach, FOOGWEE crevice cleaning brushes can effortlessly reach into narrow spaces and corners with its only 0.5 cm bristle thickness

Easy to Store: FOOGWEE hard bristle brush is designed with a hanging hole, which can keep the brush dry while saving storage space and convenient access

Multi-function Cleaning Tools: FOOGWEE cleaning brush is not only suitable for home cleaning, but also very suitable for a variety of scenes such as cars, kitchens, bathrooms and construction sites to meet different cleaning needs
